description: Compute metacognitive calibration metrics, specifically Overconfidence Bias and Brier Score, using the 2-Alternative Forced Choice (2AFC) dataset located at ~/pebl/data/metacognition_data.csv. The analysis requires excluding timeout trials (correct = -1) and removing any participants who recorded confidence ratings below 50. For all remaining valid participants, calculate Accuracy, Mean Confidence (on a 0-1 scale), Overconfidence Bias (Mean Confidence - Accuracy), and Brier Score (mean((confidence/100 - correct)^2)). These metrics must be calculated overall and for each task_domain ('memory' and 'perceptual'), followed by the calculation of group means across all valid participants. Save the final results to ~/pebl/analysis/metacognition_report.json.

metadata.data_source: Derived from Rahnev et al., 2020 The Confidence Database parameters
